mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalRuns, SUM(CASE WHEN r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as runsLast7Days, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'FINISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as finishedRuns FROM run r

SELECT rm.metric_def_id as metricDefId, md.name as metricName, rm.metric_value as value, r.id as runId FROM run r JOIN run_metric rm ON r.id = rm.run_id JOIN metric_def md ON rm.metric_def_id = md.id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN md.direction = 'MAX' THEN rm.metric_value ELSE -rm.metric_value END DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as x,
MAX(rm.metric_value) MIN(rm.metric_value) as y FROM run r JOIN run_metric rm ON r.id = rm.run_id
AND rm.metric_def_id = #{filter.metricDefId} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY x ASC

choose.when:
SELECT t.name as name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as value FROM run r JOIN run_tag rt ON r.id = rt.run_id JOIN tag t ON rt.tag_id = t.id
GROUP BY t.name

SELECT IFNULL(r.model_name, 'Unknown') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM run r
GROUP BY r.model_name

SELECT IFNULL(r.dataset_name, 'Unknown') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM run r
GROUP BY r.dataset_name

mapper.select:
SELECT r.id as runId, r.name as runName, r.model_name as modelName, r.dataset_name as datasetName, rm.metric_value as value, r.created_at as createdAt, r.status as status FROM run r JOIN run_metric rm ON r.id = rm.run_id
AND rm.metric_def_id = #{filter.metricDefId} ORDER BY
rm.metric_value DESC rm.metric_value ASC
LIMIT #{filter.limit}
